name: Garlic and Oil Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the olive oil in a medium skillet over medium heat.
2. Add the chopped garlic and red pepper flakes to the skillet. Cook, stirring occasionally, until the garlic is tender, about 4 minutes.
3. Stir in the salt and black pepper. Remove from heat.
4. Toss the sauce with hot pasta in a serving bowl.
5. Sprinkle grated Parmesan cheese over the pasta and toss again.
6. Serve with extra grated Parmesan cheese and freshly ground black pepper for each person to taste.
Serves 4 (side dish)
